title: ixora subcuneata
intro: Ixora subcuneata, a flowering plant species native to India, is a type of shrub that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. Traditionally, the plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Ixora subcuneata are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various skin conditions, including eczema and acne. The plant is often prepared as a tea, powder, or infusion, and is used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
